definition:
περι-άπτω, 
 [in LXX: 3Ma.3:7 * ;] 
  1. to tie about, attach. 
   2. In late writers, to light a fire around, kindle: πῦρ, Luk.22:55.†
 SYN.: θιγγάνω, ψηλαφάω. ἅ. is the stronger, θ., to touch, the lighter term. ψ. is to feel, as in search of something (Tr., Syn., § xvii; Lft., Col., 201 f.)  (AS)
